text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Um, Gimlet? Tazuna said she wants to see you in
the director's office later.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Just a guess, but it's probably about the fence
you broke the other day...

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Summons from Prospero? So I must needs
set sail into a tempest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Huh? P-pros... what? Umm, it's Tazuna who wants
to see you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Tempest... Indeed, a scolding from Tazuna is like
a tempest—fierce.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, if you just own up to it, I'm sure
she'd forgive you.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
I cannot betray my ineffable self. Even if I mean it
not.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I think we should all just not break any
fences, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: Without strength, I cannot live. Without beauty, I will not live. Destruction is my raison d'être.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
(I still don't get why she'd break a fence if she
knows she's gonna get in trouble!)
